data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic hold expiry and seat release.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic hold expiry and seat release, as stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not specifically address or validate the automatic release of seats after a hold expires, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of automatic hold expiry and seat release validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for hold expiry validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify automatic hold expiry and seat release.
